title: 6 INSANE Claude Cowork Use Cases to Save Hours (AI Workflow Automation)
summary: Claude Cowork is demonstrated through six automation use cases including morning briefing generation, content creation in custom voice, email triage and drafting, research report generation, interactive dashboard creation, and mobile agent control. The video showcases practical workflow applications beyond basic chatbot usage.
writeup: The video walks through six automation use cases for Claude Cowork: generating a morning briefing, producing content in a custom voice, triaging and drafting email, generating research reports, building interactive dashboards, and controlling an agent from mobile. It frames these as practical workflows that move past basic chatbot prompting toward delegated, multi-step tasks. The takeaway is a concrete picture of where an AI agent fits into recurring work like briefings, writing, inbox handling, and reporting.
